creator: tingox+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Confirmed here as well (installed from ports:
tingo@kg-core1$ pkg info Cura*
Cura-4.8.0_4,2
CuraEngine-4.8_1,1

when cura exits, it leaves a Python core file behind (not important, but still)
tingo@kg-core1$ file python3.7.core
python3.7.core: ELF 64-bit LSB core file, x86-64, version 1 (FreeBSD), FreeBSD-style, from '/usr/local/bin/python3.7 /usr/local/bin/cura', pid=34115
